subject: Maksym Chernyak
summary: 44-year-old Ukrainian humanitarian parolee (fled Russian invasion) died Feb 20, 2025 after stroke at Krome. Staff delayed calling 911 for 40-45 minutes during neurological emergency (vomiting, seizure, unresponsiveness), believing he was 'intoxicated.' Neurologist: 'No medical professional activated 911' for 45 minutes. Brain damage irreversible by hospital arrival. Brain death Feb 19, died Feb 20. Wrongful death lawsuit in preparation. Third death at Krome in 28 days.

key_findings.facility: Krome Service Processing Center, Miami, FL
key_findings.pattern: Time-sensitive emergency, delayed response, preventable death
key_findings.lawsuit: Wrongful death lawsuit in preparation by widow
